query:
SELECT 
  q.versionNumber,
  qi.itemType,
  qi.description,
  qi.closetConfig,
  LENGTH(qi.closetConfig) as config_length
FROM quotations q
JOIN quotationItems qi ON q.id = qi.quotationId
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-1775675643251'
AND qi.itemType = 'closet'
ORDER BY q.versionNumber DESC;
command:

  qi.itemType,
  qi.description,
  qi.closetConfig,
  LENGTH(qi.closetConfig) as config_length

JOIN quotationItems qi ON q.id = qi.quotationId
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-1775675643251'
AND qi.itemType = 'closet'
ORDER BY q.versionNumber DESC;
